mapper.insert:
select project_seq.nextval from dual
insert into projects values( #{dto.project_seq}, #{dto.project_name}, #{dto.contents}, #{dto.start_date}, #{dto.end_date}, #{dto.status}, #{loginId}, sysdate)
mapper.select: select p.*, pm.users_id as member_users_id , u.name, u.sysname, cu.name as created_name from projects p left join project_members pm on pm.project_seq = p.project_seq left join users u on u.id = pm.users_id left join users cu on cu.id = p.users_id order by p.start_date

select p.*, pm.users_id as member_users_id , u.name, u.sysname, cu.name as created_name from projects p left join project_members pm on pm.project_seq = p.project_seq left join users u on u.id = pm.users_id left join users cu on cu.id = p.users_id where p.users_id = #{loginId} or exists ( select 1 from project_members pm2 where pm2.project_seq = p.project_seq and pm2.users_id = #{loginId} ) order by p.start_date
mapper.update: update projects set project_name = #{project_name}, contents = #{contents}, start_date = #{start_date}, end_date = #{end_date}, status = 'IN_PROGRESS' where project_seq = #{project_seq}
update projects set status = 'DONE' where project_seq = #{project_seq}
mapper.select: select users_id from project_members where project_seq = #{project_seq}
